meta.title: Jesús Díaz | Software Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Jesús Díaz — Software Engineer from Caracas, Venezuela. Building modern, scalable web applications.

hero.name: Jesús Díaz
hero.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with clean code and modern technologies

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Computer Science Engineer graduated from Andrés Bello Catholic University (UCAB), based in Caracas, Venezuela, with over two years of experience building real-world applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. I'm passionate about turning complex problems into intuitive, well-crafted digital experiences.
about.paragraph2: I specialize in full-stack development with a strong focus on user experience and end-user needs. Every feature I build starts with one question: how will this make the user's life easier? From responsive interfaces and reporting modules to process automation and client-server connectivity, I design solutions that are not only scalable and maintainable, but genuinely useful for the people who use them.
about.paragraph3: My goal is to write clean, well-structured code aligned with modern development best practices. I value technical quality because I know it directly impacts the final product and the user's experience. I see every project as an opportunity to keep growing professionally and deliver solutions that make a real impact.

kompii.title: Kompii — Lending Platform
kompii.description: Online lending platform operating in the Dominican Republic and Venezuela. Complete redesign of the admin app migrating from Material UI to ShadCN UI and from Page Router to App Router, implementing tRPC for type-safe communication. Mobile app development with Expo.

carshop.title: CarShop — Automotive Marketplace
carshop.description: Marketplace of automotive workshops where users access workshops, request quotes, contract services, and keep a service history. Companies view quality metrics, completed services, and customer satisfaction.

eddu.title: Eddu — Collections Management
eddu.description: Collections management platform for educational systems with modules for reports, process automation, collections, and notifications. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and Google Cloud Functions.

ministeriosId.title: Ministerios Id — Ministry Website
ministeriosId.description: Institutional website for a Christian ministry featuring a video hero section, multi-page about section with doctrine, mission, and outreach, volunteer application, donation forms, and contact system with email notifications via Resend. Built with Next.js 15, HeroUI, and scroll-snap navigation.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with Next.js, TypeScript, and HeroUI. Features i18n, dark mode, smooth section transitions, and contact form with Resend.

kompii.description: Leading technology modernization and app maintenance in a monorepo with Turborepo and pnpm. Redesigned the admin app from Material UI to ShadCN UI, migrating from Page Router to App Router with tRPC. Developing the mobile app with Expo. Refactoring backend business logic for scalability. Integrating AI tools like Claude Code Agent to optimize workflow.

gma.description: Developed CarShop, a marketplace of automotive workshops where users access workshops, request quotes, contract services, and keep a service history. Workshop companies view quality metrics, completed services, customer satisfaction, and work tracking.

eddu.description: Developed Eddu, a collections management platform for educational systems with modules for reports, process automation, collections, and notifications. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Google Cloud Functions, and PostgreSQL.
